vllm.title: [CI/Benchmark] add more iteration and use multiple percentiles for robust latency benchmark
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Prior to this PR, we use average latency across 3 runs, which seems to be very unstable. Here is what I get across 5 runs:
0.4430512798329194
0.4450072580948472
0.45556532715757686
0.451823682213823
0.4521045722067356

The first step to optimize latency is to have a reliable benchmark. In this PR, I

vllm.title: [Core] enable out-of-tree model register
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Usage: add three lines:
from vllm.model_executor.models import ModelRegistry
from your_code import YourModelForCausalLM
ModelRegistry.register_out_of_tree_model("YourModelForCausalLM", YourModelForCausalLM)
